# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 1.2.x   | ✅ |
| < 1.2   | ❌ |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Email **masood.nfc77@gmail.com** with:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact

You'll receive a response within 48 hours. If confirmed, a fix will be released and you'll be credited in the release notes (unless you prefer to remain anonymous).
